title: GEN-5-A: instrument library source census + canonical schema proposal
intent: Bounded first slice of GEN-5. Add a stdlib-only, read-only census utility that inspects the five legacy instrument-library sources (no app.* imports) and emits a deterministic JSON census + human audit + canonical schema proposal. Conflicts are reported, not resolved. No runtime consumer, router, service, registry, model, or vectorizer behavior changes; no legacy source is modified. GEN-5 remains open.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) build_instrument_library_census.py: new stdlib-only utility (json/ast/argparse/os/sys/datetime/pathlib) that loads 4 JSON sources + AST-parses guitars/__init__.py and models.py for MODEL_SPECS/MODEL_INFOS keys without importing app.*; normalizes IDs (explicit alias map only), classifies field roles, emits same-semantic conflicts, missing-by-source, and a schema proposal; deterministic (generated_at excluded from --check). (2) generated census JSON. (3) census test suite. (4) human-readable audit report. (5) the dev-order handoff. (6) SPRINTS.md GEN-5-A progress note (no closure; census JSON is the current-count authority). (7) this manifest.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: GEN-5's five sources currently have no single map of coverage/conflicts. This census is the evidence artifact a later migration needs; it introduces no runtime authority and cannot regress behavior because nothing imports it and no legacy source is touched.

commands_run: ast scan of the utility -> imports only stdlib (json/ast/argparse/os/sys/datetime/pathlib); zero app.* imports
determinism: two --write runs differ only in generated_at (JSON); Markdown identical

files.intent: Stdlib-only read-only census utility; no app.* imports; deterministic artifacts.
files.behavior_change: none - standalone script, not imported by any router/service

files.intent: Generated deterministic census artifact (current-count authority for GEN-5).
Focused tests for the census utility and artifact shape.
Human-readable audit with conflicts, alias notes, and the canonical schema proposal.
Add GEN-5-A progress note; do not close GEN-5; point counts to the census JSON.
Per-PR CBSP21 manifest for this slice.
